title: melaleuca citrina
intro: Melaleuca citrina, also known as Lemon Myrtle, is a plant species native to Australia that belongs to the myrtle family. The leaves of this plant contain a high concentration of citral, which gives it its distinctive citrus flavor and aroma, and have been used in traditional medicine for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Melaleuca citrina make it beneficial for various health issues, including sore throats, coughs, and digestive problems, as well as for its antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Melaleuca citrina include teas, essential oils, and supplements, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
